name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna Chicken And Sweet Potato 50g
shortDescription: Appropriate for any Cat/Kitten as a healthy treat but not a substitute for a complete balanced food. Make sufficient drinking water available.
description: The Soup can be given as a complementary food or just as everyday reward/treat. You can use a spoon on which you are offering the soup in several portions. Always have fresh drinking water available for your cat. See imprint on package. Contents: Water, Tuna fillet 15.40%, Chicken 10%, Sweet potato 4.7%, Fish broth, Natural thickener (Tapioca starch (E1442), Guar gum (E412)). Nutrient Components: Crude Protein 8%, Crude Fat 0.3%, Crude Ash 1%, Crude Fiber 0.1%, Moisture 90%.
